hero.kicker: Our little one is on the way!
hero.thanks: So glad to have you celebrating with us today 💛

menu.eyebrow: a feast for our little bee
menu.title: The Menu
menu.foot: Live stations are made-to-order — request your favourites!

scratch.title: Boy or Girl?
scratch.sub: Scratch the seal... but don't get too excited 😉

reveal.p: The real reveal is at the cake-cutting — stay tuned! 🎂

favors.title: Before You Go! 🤍
favors.body: Please don't forget to grab a party favor on your way out! Just a little token of our appreciation for celebrating with us today.

live.title: Live at the Party
live.sub: A few games Neethu and her friends have cooked up — keep an eye out 🐝

lp1.title: Diaper Pong
lp1.rules: Like beer pong — minus the beer. Toss table-tennis balls into the diapers mounted on the wall. Most balls landed wins.

lp2.title: Diaper Changing Race
lp2.rules: Blindfolded, three people at a time race to fasten a diaper on a plastic baby.
lp2.note: Sorry — no real babies for this one 🐣

lp3.title: Assemble Baby Face
lp3.rules: Strips of Neethu and Kevin's faces, cut up and shuffled. Piece them together to guess what our little duckling might look like.

live.foot: stick around · prizes for the winners 💛

footer.line1: made with 🐝 + 💛 for our little one

join.intro: Pick a nickname so we can show your name on the leaderboard.

trivia.intro: 10 questions about babies and pregnancy. 15 seconds per question. Speed bonus for fast correct answers.
trivia.scoring: 100 points per correct answer + up to 100 bonus points based on how fast you tap.

scrambleGame.title: Word Scramble
scrambleGame.sub: Unscramble as many baby words as you can — 90 seconds!
scrambleGame.intro: You'll get a stream of scrambled baby-themed words. Type the answer, hit Enter (or skip — but you get fewer points later).
scrambleGame.scoring: 10 points per correct word + bonus for time remaining.

emojiGame.title: Emoji Pictionary
emojiGame.sub: Each emoji puzzle = one baby phrase. Pick the right answer!

predGame.title: Predictions
predGame.sub: Peek into baby's future. We'll save your prophecies for posterity.
predGame.pickQ: Pick a question, then drop your prediction:
predGame.wallEmpty: No predictions yet — be the first prophet 🔮

dueGame.title: Due Date Guess
dueGame.sub: When will baby actually arrive? Closest guess wins after birth!

namesGame.title: Suggest a Name
namesGame.sub: We haven't picked a name yet — help us! Vote for your favourites too.

onesieGame.title: Design a Onesie
onesieGame.sub: Doodle something for baby's first outfit. Most-loved design wins!
onesieGame.tooLarge: image too large — try fewer details

adviceGame.title: Advice Wall
adviceGame.sub: Leave Kevin & Neethu your best parenting wisdom
adviceGame.msgPh: The one thing I wish someone had told me...
adviceGame.wallEmpty: Be the first to leave advice!

voiceGame.title: Voice Notes for Baby
voiceGame.sub: Record a 30-second message. We'll play these for our little one when they're old enough to understand them.
voiceGame.tapHold: Tap and hold to record — release when done
voiceGame.noSupport: Your browser does not support recording 😢
voiceGame.noMic: Microphone access denied. Please allow it.
voiceGame.error: Could not save. Maybe too long?
voiceGame.wallEmpty: No notes yet — be the first to say hello!

leaderboardPage.title: Leaderboard
leaderboardPage.sub: Live across all guests · auto-refreshes every few seconds
leaderboardPage.empty: No scores yet — go play a game and come back!

memoryWall.title: Memory Wall
memoryWall.sub: Everything you've left for our little one — voices, advice, predictions, names, drawings 🐝
memoryWall.empty: Memories will gather here as guests contribute throughout the day 🐝

games.title: Baby Shower Games
games.sub: Earn points, leave wishes, draw a onesie 🐝
games.scrambleSub: Unscramble baby words against the clock
games.dueSub: Pick the arrival date — closest wins!
games.predSub: Guess the future for this little one
games.namesSub: Help us pick — vote for your favourites
games.onesieSub: Doodle your design for baby to wear
games.adviceSub: Leave Kevin & Neethu your best parenting wisdom
games.voiceSub: Record a 30-second message for our little one
games.songsSub: Open the live playlist · add your favourites directly
games.memorySub: Everything everyone has left for our little one
